# Vendored UI Assets

This workbench vendors open-source UI CSS locally so the app can run offline in a lab environment.

- `tabler.min.css`: Tabler Core 1.2.0, MIT License, https://github.com/tabler/tabler
- `tabler-icons.min.css` and `fonts/tabler-icons.*`: Tabler Icons Webfont 3.34.1, MIT License, https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons
